title: Pixlli
description: A new pbr/pom resource pack that will give you more detail, preserving the vanilla of your game and creating a feeling of your favorite pixelation.
body:
A new pbr/pom resource pack that will give you more detail, preserving the vanilla of your game and creating a feeling of your favorite pixelation. ## You can find 256-512x versions on [Boosty](https://illystray.com/select) or [Patreon](https://illystray.com/select) | [Official site](https://illystray.com/modrinth-pixlli-site) **CTM and other Addons can be found [here](https://illystray.com/addons/)** **Update every month, on the 2nd and 16th** **Are there any problems with the resource pack? Check the [FAQ](https://illystray.com/support/)**
**Join us in [Discord](https://discord.gg/H6Rcd3y)!** ## 1.21.11 update is now available! ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfcd3656813beae3c7dd0da81ac958c09c9abc0b.jpeg) ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/babbd8d29b9fb24f31d3619fa8bc38525e09a79f.webp)
